creator: topical@gmx.net
text:
Since quarterly update (at least v1.14.0), package misses UI.

When you go try use it by browser, you get only:

"Vault UI is not available in this binary.

To get Vault UI do one of the following:

Download an official release
Run make bin to create your own release binaries.
Run make dev-ui to create a development binary with the UI."

Seems that Makefile is broken/incomplete. Unfortunately, this makes Vault unusable.
